subject: WS1.4 assumptions blockers resolved; green again
body: Fiery WS1.4 update: resolved Ramanujan assumptions blockers and Rawls test classification remains fixed. No-I/O: default jsonld.js driver now pre-detects remote @context references and returns remote_context_disallowed before invoking jsonld; driver also passes a no-remote documentLoader as a second guard; integration test proves remote context is rejected. Domain boundary: graph-core integration fixture no longer uses Oak/curric semantics; it uses generic example.org linked-thread JSON-LD and DatasetCore equivalence. Wording: jsonld/index.ts and driver comments now describe a jsonld.js v9 adapter boundary rather than a generic replaceable seam. Test classification: pure injected-driver unit suite and real jsonld integration suite are split. Verification green: pnpm --filter @oaknational/graph-core test (5 files, 40 tests), type-check, lint, build, and git diff --check on claimed paths.
